onboarding.setupWorkspace: Let's set up your workspace to get started.
onboarding.quickStartDescription: Create a personal workspace and start using AgentMesh immediately.
onboarding.createTeamWorkspaceDescription: Set up a workspace for your team with a custom name and invite members.
onboarding.inviteCodeComingSoon: Invite code feature is coming soon
onboarding.createWorkspaceFailed: Failed to create workspace. The name might already be taken.

createOrg.subtitle: Set up a workspace for your team to collaborate.
createOrg.workspaceNameHint: This is the display name for your workspace.
createOrg.urlIdentifierHint: This will be used in URLs. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens are allowed.
createOrg.urlTooShort: URL identifier must be at least 3 characters
createOrg.urlTaken: This URL identifier is already taken. Please try another.
createOrg.createFailed: Failed to create workspace. Please try again.

setupRunner.title: Connect Your First Runner
setupRunner.subtitle: A Runner executes AI agent tasks. You need at least one Runner to start using AgentMesh.
setupRunner.localRunnerDescription: Run a Runner on your local machine. Perfect for development and testing.
setupRunner.cloudRunnerDescription: Use AgentMesh-hosted Runners. No setup required, instant availability.
setupRunner.skipForNow: Skip for now, I'll set this up later

localRunner.title: Set Up Local Runner
localRunner.subtitle: Follow the steps below to connect your local machine as a Runner.
localRunner.tokenWarning: ⚠️ Keep this token safe. It will only be shown once.
localRunner.tokenGenerationFailed: Failed to generate runner token. Please try again.
localRunner.connectionTimeout: No runner connected yet. Make sure you've started the runner with the correct token.
localRunner.runnerConnectedDescription: Your runner is now online and ready to execute tasks.

hero.description: Unified management for Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Aider and more. Enable multiple AI agents to collaborate on complex development tasks.

agentLogos.title: Supports all major Terminal-based Coding Agents

whyTerminal.title: Why
whyTerminal.description: Unlike IDE plugins like Cursor or Copilot, terminal-based agents offer autonomous execution and complete development capabilities.

autonomous.title: Autonomous Execution
autonomous.description: Not just code completion. Terminal agents can independently complete complex development tasks from start to finish.

fullCapabilities.title: Full Capabilities
fullCapabilities.description: Read/write files, execute commands, Git operations, run tests - complete full-stack development capabilities.

dataControl.title: Data Control
dataControl.description: Self-hosted runners mean your code never leaves your infrastructure. Meet security and compliance requirements.

coreFeatures.title: Core
coreFeatures.description: Everything you need to manage and coordinate terminal-based AI coding agents at scale.

agentpod.title: AgentPod
agentpod.subtitle: Remote AI Workstation
agentpod.description: Run AI agents in the cloud, access a complete development environment through your browser. Each AgentPod runs on isolated Git worktrees with real-time terminal access.

agentmesh.title: AgentMesh
agentmesh.subtitle: Multi-Agent Collaboration
agentmesh.description: Enable multiple AI agents to work together through pod bindings and channel communication. Visualize the collaboration topology in real-time.

tickets.title: Tickets
tickets.subtitle: Task-Driven Development
tickets.description: Integrate AI pods with your task management workflow. Create tickets, bind them to pods, and track progress through a Kanban board.

runners.title: Self-hosted Runners
runners.subtitle: Your Infrastructure, Your Data
runners.description: Deploy runners on your own infrastructure. Your code and data never leave your environment, meeting the strictest security and compliance requirements.

howItWorks.title: Get Started in
howItWorks.description: Deploy, connect, and start collaborating with AI agents in minutes.

step1.title: Deploy Runner
step1.description: Deploy a Runner on your server or local machine with a single command.

step2.title: Connect Agent
step2.description: Configure your AI coding agent to connect to AgentMesh.

step3.title: Start Collaborating
step3.description: Create pods, channels, and let multiple agents work together.

enterprise.title: Built for
enterprise.description: Security, compliance, and scalability features that enterprise teams require.

multiTenant.title: Multi-Tenant
multiTenant.description: Organization and team hierarchy with isolated workspaces.

sso.title: SSO Integration
sso.description: SAML 2.0 and LDAP support for enterprise authentication.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.description: Complete activity tracking for compliance and security.

rbac.title: RBAC
rbac.description: Fine-grained role-based access control for teams.

gitIntegration.title: Git Integration
gitIntegration.description: GitLab, GitHub, and Gitee support out of the box.

monitoring.title: Monitoring
monitoring.description: Prometheus metrics and Grafana dashboards included.

backupDR.title: Backup & DR
backupDR.description: Automated backups with disaster recovery support.

airGapped.title: Air-Gapped
airGapped.description: Fully offline deployment for maximum security.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent
pricing.description: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect for individual developers getting started.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For teams that need more power and collaboration.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For organizations with advanced security needs.

pricing.footer: All plans include SSL encryption, 99.9% uptime SLA, and regular backups.

selfHosted.title: Need Complete
selfHosted.description: AgentMesh supports fully self-hosted deployment. Your code and data never leave your infrastructure. Perfect for enterprises with strict security and compliance requirements.

finalCta.description: Join thousands of developers using AgentMesh to coordinate AI coding agents. Get started for free, no credit card required.

heroDemo.monitorPod: Monitor pod beta-dev and help coordinate the auth implementation

heroDemo.noticedOAuth: I notice beta-dev is implementing OAuth. I'll suggest adding rate limiting...

heroDemo.reviewChanges: Great! beta-dev implemented rate limiting. Now I'll review the changes...
